article.p: MetaOWL provides a built-in store for managing application state.

h2.style: font-size: 1.5rem; font-weight: 600; color: var(--doc-heading-color); margin-top: 32px; margin-bottom: 16px;

pre.style: padding: 16px; border-radius: 8px; overflow-x: auto; font-size: 14px; margin-bottom: 24px;

h2.style: font-size: 1.5rem; font-weight: 600; color: var(--doc-heading-color); margin-top: 32px; margin-bottom: 16px;

article.p: The store is a reactive object. Simply read and write properties directly:

pre.style: padding: 16px; border-radius: 8px; overflow-x: auto; font-size: 14px; margin-bottom: 24px;

h2.style: font-size: 1.5rem; font-weight: 600; color: var(--doc-heading-color); margin-top: 32px; margin-bottom: 16px;

pre.style: padding: 16px; border-radius: 8px; overflow-x: auto; font-size: 14px; margin-bottom: 24px;

h2.style: font-size: 1.5rem; font-weight: 600; color: var(--doc-heading-color); margin-top: 32px; margin-bottom: 16px;

div.class: bg-gray-100 dark:bg-[#1e202e] border border-gray-300 dark:border-none rounded-lg p-6 mb-8
div.p: This counter is powered by the MetaOWL Store. Try out the buttons!

button.class: px-5 py-3 bg-red-500 text-white border-none rounded-md cursor-pointer text-lg font-bold hover:bg-red-600 transition-colors

span.class: text-4xl font-bold text-gray-900 dark:text-white min-w-[60px] text-center

button.class: px-5 py-3 bg-green-500 text-white border-none rounded-md cursor-pointer text-lg font-bold hover:bg-green-600 transition-colors
px-4 py-2 bg-gray-500 text-white border-none rounded-md cursor-pointer text-sm font-medium hover:bg-gray-600 transition-colors
